The '''Second Battle of Alaris Prime''' took place during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], having secured the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]] technology from its secret [[Eredenn Station|development site]] on [[Eredenn Prime|Eredenn]], launched an assault on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] colony of [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] to acquire the Decimator activation codes stolen by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of [[Eredenn Prime]].

==The battle==
After landing on Alaris Prime, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] established an island base and struck out against the five Wookiee forces. The battle raged on land, sea and air, with the initial advantage holding for the Wookiees. Sensing the need to disrupt reinforcements, Sev'rance destroyed their transmitter tower and pressed on.

The strongest force against the CIS was the Republic presence followed by the outpost [[Chendrrl]], then [[Rwookawarrump]], [[Llamitcuk]], [[Tayriiwook]], and finally [[Rwaawrrkoo]].

In the end, Sev'rance defeated the Republic and Wookiee forces, and secured the codes using a [[Protocol droid/Legends|data droid]].
